locations.season_role: Default exterior; storm sheen in September; winter emergency exteriors in December.
Corporate contrast; marketing surface of FusionZoo infrastructure.

locations.world_bible_section: 2. Canon Locations / The Fusion Lab / The Annex
locations.season_role: Truth archive contrast; not required as a season setpiece unless an issue stages it.
Primary Issue 01 environment: neon, food stands, games, temporary rides, projection screens.
Public spotlight and countdown; competing priority against overlooked rescues.
Dark corridor where overlooked people are trapped during the climax.
Service gate and malfunctioning control box; reacts differently when NeonBlue approaches.

locations.display_name: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
locations.season_role: Back-to-routine storm season exteriors and public systems reactivating after summer.
Transit boards and speakers carrying the six-tone interference.
School speakers and routine-public systems that overload with the same burst.
Climax of Issue 02; first mapped physical node of the dormant Echo network.
Halloween attraction reopened over older FusionZoo infrastructure.
Interior rooms with misdirecting exit signs and compliance tests.
Zombie-recognized legacy path; Scarline identifies current safe route above it.
November gathering for gratitude, service, and chosen family.
System that reorganizes seats for forced ideal harmony; Moodz rejects it.
Storm shelter with holiday lights, temporary heat, and stranded residents.
Where heat is diverted to awaken the fifth Echo relay; strength alone cannot fix it.
City preparing what to preserve, rebuild, retire, and become.
Dormant central relay; finale setpiece for two incompatible futures and third path.

props.notes: Readable B/W; hideable in scenery; complete only in January.
Associated with Patch / NeonBlue memory; matches August frequency in September.
Lil Devil wants to force it; only useful after NeonBlue identifies safe force.
Maps mechanism; cannot read emotional meaning of six tones.
Recurring audio/visual static pattern; not a physical handheld after first reveal unless staged.
Directs different characters to different doors.
Zombie touches it; third segment lights.
Smell/residue Zombie recognizes; not horror gore.
Playful scares contrast with real system under the attraction.
Final image: empty place marked by fifth unlit Echo segment.
Tracks emotional response; Static detects tracking.
Feeds the same failure pattern if misused.

props.display_name: Heating Sequence Plate / Dormant Phrase Panel
props.notes: Ash recognizes old phrase/diagram; completes activation sequence with precise words.
TwoTone keeps resources balanced until missing information appears.
Super Monkey holds structure; not the real fix.
Shows two incompatible futures with real benefits and costs.
Full six-segment symbol only clear in January finale.
